Enumeration Case# kUSBHighSpeedMicrosecondsInFrame

Mac Catalyst 18.4+macOS 10.2+

```
kUSBHighSpeedMicrosecondsInFrame = 125
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/1425805-microsecondsinframe/kusbhighspeedmicrosecondsinframe#discussion)

The device is attached to a bus running at high speed (125 microseconds / frame).
